f8642d8f-41c7-4e31-9a08-cebef65c06ed.description: 每日早上8点检查当前时间
f8642d8f-41c7-4e31-9a08-cebef65c06ed.prompt: 打开浏览器，查看当前时间，然后调用 finish_task 报告当前时间。

e50d516b-fe81-4dd4-873f-03a96657d040.prompt: Navigate to https://www.bilibili.com/ and take a screenshot of the homepage. Save it with a timestamp in the filename (e.g., bilibili_homepage_YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MM-SS.png) in the workspace directory. Then send the screenshot file to the user.

7b0417b0-4e41-4657-b93a-1f5ddc97efa3.prompt: 导航到GitHub首页 https://github.com ，然后截图GitHub的首页。使用send_screenshot功能来发送截图给用户，描述为"GitHub Homepage at 20:25"。

5f61637f-372d-4e9f-86a0-f727413e3ead.description: Take screenshot of GitHub homepage at 20:37
5f61637f-372d-4e9f-86a0-f727413e3ead.prompt: Navigate to GitHub homepage (https://github.com) and take a screenshot of the current page. Save the screenshot to the workspace with filename 'github_homepage_20_37.png' and report that the screenshot has been captured at 20:37.

d12bfd2c-d620-43a4-9a95-f3e62092306e.prompt: Navigate to GitHub homepage and take a screenshot. First navigate to https://github.com, then take a screenshot of the page and save it to the workspace with filename github_homepage_2054.png
